result.finding: Estimated final image size is approximately 250-300MB: eclipse-temurin:8-jre base (~220MB) plus a Spring Boot fat JAR (~50-80MB including Oracle JDBC driver and all dependencies). No additional package installations in the final stage. Multi-stage build excludes Maven and build tooling from the final image.
evidence: Final stage base image: eclipse-temurin:8-jre (~220MB compressed)
No apt-get/apk/yum package installations in final stage
Single COPY --from=build copies only the fat JAR (photo-album-*.jar)
Spring Boot fat JAR with Oracle JDBC driver estimated at 50-80MB
Source code is minimal (324KB), build artifacts not included beyond JAR
Multi-stage build keeps final image lean by excluding Maven and build sources
